description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Product DetailsPointy toed high heeled sandal with wood toned forefoot straps and criss-crossing midfoot straps that loop around the ankleHeart shaped buckle at the ankle loopCut outs on all the strapsLightly padded footbed with cartoon themed fabric patchTough heel with a plastic heel patchTPU outsoleHeel: 4.2"Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
